message:
fix(tls): add missing Ok(0) break in WriteZero flush loop

The flush loop added in 653a250 was missing the `Ok(0) => break`
arm that the original flush loop has. Without it, if poll_write_tls
returns Ok(0) (underlying IO can't accept more bytes) while
wants_write() is still true, the loop would spin indefinitely.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
